core_skills: Full-Stack Development, React, TypeScript, Python, AI-Assisted Development
skill_match_scores: Full-Stack Development:0.0, React:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, Python:1.0, AI-Assisted Development:0.0
must_have_quals: 3 years of experience building web applications with React/TypeScript and Python or similar technologies, Demonstrated experience using LLM-based coding tools to accelerate development, A track record of rapidly prototyping and shipping products, Proficiency in API design, systems integration, and data visualization, Strong proficiency in Python is a primary requirement for this role
preferred_quals: Experience building AI-native applications, prompt engineering, or working with LLM APIs, Familiarity with the Model Context Protocol (MCP) or similar agentic frameworks (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, etc.), Prior experience building workforce management, scheduling, or operations platforms
core_responsibilities: Full-Stack Development: Design, build, and maintain scalable web applications using React/TypeScript and Python, AI-Assisted Development: Leverage LLM-based coding tools like Cursor, Copilot, and Claude to accelerate development velocity, Rapid Prototyping: Quickly iterate on new product ideas, going from 0 to 1 in short timeframes, API Design & Integration: Build robust APIs and integrate with various internal and external systems, Data Visualization: Create interactive dashboards and data visualizations using tools like Plotly, D3, or Streamlit, LLM Application Development: (Strong Plus) Build AI-native applications, engineer prompts, and work with LLM APIs
job_summary: Aditi Consulting is seeking talented full-stack engineers to join their dynamic team in building cutting-edge AI-powered applications. The role involves designing, building, and maintaining scalable web applications, leveraging AI-assisted development tools, and rapidly prototyping new product ideas.
